top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-25';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-25';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-25';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-25';

FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-25';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-25';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM transactions_1k t

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-25';
